title: Unique Dark Refined
description: Dark UI with unique textures for functional blocks. Different version of Unique Dark
body:
# Unique Dark Refined

[![Unique Dark Refined on Modrinth](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/modrinth@2x.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-refined)
[![Unique Dark Refined on CurseForge](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/curseforge@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-dark-refined)
[![amongstreality on Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/patreon@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![amongstreality on Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/bmc@2x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

Unique Dark Refined is a complete redesign of my other resource pack [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark).

This resource pack has unique textures for every functional block in the game. Some textures require [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui).

## Unique Dark Refined - Lite vs Full

Unique Dark Refined - Lite is the version of this resource pack available for download on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-refined) and [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-dark-refined).

Unique Dark Refined - Full is the version of this resource pack available for download on my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality) and [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality).

> ⚠️ **Warning:** this resource pack is only available for download on platforms mentioned above and has its own page on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/unique-dark-refined/). If you find it on any other platform - **do not download it** from them, because they redistribute it unofficially and unauthorized. The download links may lead to malicious websites and the content you download may contain viruses.

This table shows which textures are included in the Lite and Full versions, and which ones require [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) to work. Textures that are not included in the Lite version were also redrawn to fit the art style of the resource pack.

| Texture                      |   Lite   |   Full   | Requires [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) |
| ---------------------------- | :------: | :------: | :--------------------------------------------------: |
| Crafting Table               | ✅ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Furnace                      | ✅ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Blast Furnace                | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Smoker                       | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Chest                        | ✅ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Trapped Chest                | ❌ | ✅ |                       ✅                       |
| Ender Chest                  | ❌ | ✅ |                       ✅                       |
| Barrel                       | ❌ | ✅ |                       ✅                       |
| Default Shulker              | ✅ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Colored Shulkers             | ❌ | ✅ |                       ✅                       |
| Anvil                        | ✅ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Enchanting Table             | ✅ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Brewing Stand                | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Beacon                       | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Stonecutter                  | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Grindstone                   | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Cartography Table            | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Smithing Table               | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Loom                         | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Dispenser                    | ❌ | ✅ |                       ✅                       |
| Dropper                      | ❌ | ✅ |                       ✅                       |
| Crafter                      | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Hopper                       | ❌ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Villager                     | ✅ | ✅ |                       ❌                       |
| Villager profession variants | ✅ | ✅ |                       ✅                       |

## Support me and my projects here:

You can access full version of Unique Dark Refined by joining Amethyst Tier membership
on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/AmongstReality) and [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

[![Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/patreon@3x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/bmc@3x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

## Mod support

You can request mod support or report issues with existing mod support [here](https://github.com/AmongstReality/Unique-Dark-Refined-Issues/issues).

- [Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis)
- [Apothic Enchanting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-enchanting)

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

- [yyz's backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack)
- [Woodworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodworks)
- [Clayworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/clayworks)
- [Boatload](https://modrinth.com/mod/boatload)
- [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/gallery)
- [Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental)
- [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms)
- [BackSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/backslot)
- [Better Smithing Table](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettersmithingtable)
- [Not interested!](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-interested)
- [Sawmill](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-sawmill)

## Terms of use

<summary>Terms of use</summary>

Author AmongstReality

Links to pages of the author on different platforms:

- [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/amongstreality/)

When you can use my assets:

- In public Modpacks on Modrinth/CurseForge.
- If you want to add mod support as an addon for the resource pack. If you do that, you have to add clear credit that
  includes links to the original resource pack.
- Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

When you can **NOT** use my assets:

- Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace.
- Locking behind a paywall (e.g. Patreon).
- Distribution of original/modified assets on any platforms.

Links to the resource pack's pages on different platforms:

- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-dark-refined)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-refined)

</details>
